vulnerabilities.title: SQL Injection in parameter 'id'
vulnerabilities.description: Error-based SQL injection detected in parameter 'id' on /api/users endpoint.
vulnerabilities.evidence:
Payload: ' OR '1'='1
Database: MySQL
Error: check the manual that corresponds to your MySQL server version
vulnerabilities.reproduction:
1. Navigate to /api/users?id=' OR '1'='1
2. Observe database error

vulnerabilities.title: Reflected XSS in parameter 'q'
vulnerabilities.description: The search parameter reflects user input without sanitization.

vulnerabilities.title: CORS reflects arbitrary origin
vulnerabilities.description: The server reflects the Origin header in Access-Control-Allow-Origin.
